author: y4rr
content: Option A: route checkpoint_sequential through ferrotorch_core::autograd::checkpoint::checkpoint. Public-API change: modules: &[M] -> Vec<Arc<dyn Module<T>>> (required to satisfy the core primitive's 'static + Send + Sync closure bound). Each segment's closure captures owned Arcs, so each segment gets its own CheckpointBackward node (RNG save/restore + recompute on backward come for free from the core primitive). Discriminating test: CountingScale with shared AtomicUsize, assert grad_fn.name() == 'CheckpointBackward' (structural) and counter strictly increases after backward (behavioural). Updated lib.rs doc table, _surface_inventory.toml, conformance_train.rs, CHANGELOG.
